$comment: Coverage thresholds for orchestrator agents and CI. Set to the honest current floor (production code = bin/ + lib/ + plugins/); ratchet upward as fixtures grow — never lower to pass. Target remains 100%.

enforcement.description: Orchestrator agents MUST run this command before marking a task complete or creating a PR. Thresholds are the current floor, not the 100% aspiration — raise them when coverage improves, and never lower them to make a change pass. If coverage drops below any threshold, the task fails.
